retrieval_text: Pine is a medicinal herb profile in the Herbalisti historical corpus. It is represented across 93 works and 161 source-linked chunks. Recorded variants include Pine, Pines. Common plant-part co-mentions include Resin, Leaf, Root, Bark, Gum, Flower. Common preparation co-mentions include Oil, Plaster, Ointment, Juice, Powder, Liniment. Common condition co-mentions include Wounds or ulcers, Cold or catarrh, Rheumatism, Consumption, Cough, Fever. Caution co-mentions include Dose caution, Narcotic or sedative caution, Allergy or sensitivity caution, Child-use caution, Bleeding caution, Toxicity watch.
